mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(order_id) AS totalOrders, COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0) AS totalRevenue FROM orders WHERE status != 'CANCELLED'

SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.name AS productName, SUM(oi.quantity) AS totalQuantitySold, COALESCE(SUM(oi.subtotal), 0) AS totalSales FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status != 'CANCELLED' GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name ORDER BY totalQuantitySold DESC
